author: lOrm
content: Fix landed: src/compaction.rs:830-912. `threshold_tokens_for` replaced with u64 basis-point math + half-up rounding. `threshold_tokens_for(16_385, 0.85) == 13_927` (was 13_600). New `ratio_to_basis_points` helper avoids f64->u32 cast lints via cast-free binary search — no #[allow], no clippy.toml. Pinning test b6 (was XFAIL) replaced with 3 forensic tests (b6a/b6b/b6c): direct math assertion, 7-row provider parameter sweep, edge cases (NaN, infinities, OOR clamps, zero context). cargo test --lib: 1336 pass / 0 fail (baseline 1334 + 2 net). cargo clippy --lib: exit 0 on compaction.rs (errors elsewhere are pre-existing in unrelated files modified by other concurrent agents).
